name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: FINAL AD FROM KELLY LOEFFLER URGES GEORGIANS TO GET OUT AND VOTE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, DECEMBER 30, 2020
FINAL AD FROM KELLY LOEFFLER URGES GEORGIANS TO GET OUT AND VOTE
ATLANTA - Today, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler released her final ad, titled "[Job To Do](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dZ_7CmG0JsKbzcFiz3prnN6v1GZbTFuZ_GhoY2rtlilg9FUjSIqAWHtvh8rdAsRDTBfuOt-KkJVHW37y9kkYd-EHZgtPNTUR6e3jbs_9KCqBDwxEwIzMKx0mXGBLZp4CTIyuN2UncRwl4pfLPnqmXAMhMa_gw4pnsL6frTyBCtfiopzwDnnWPA==&c=-cEXZqSBWNdbx3txv1gBp-fnOQnyEG39YHZ4K2K3e29TFpOOz_aOxg==&ch=SPLamO-i0oYFdIH_XWPgMjN0JVWzqQHdH6YUq1ElVAlNMNjLATy1Ww==)," encouraging Georgians to get out and vote this Tuesday, January 5th. Senator Loeffler said it best: "If you vote, we will win. If you don't, we will lose America." Find your polling location [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dZ_7CmG0JsKbzcFiz3prnN6v1GZbTFuZ_GhoY2rtlilg9FUjSIqAWJj1W9HXM0ICn7-KnGSsloQtLuu813gh1J0UqyHTO-RapXJeJ5HAGKeqa9e2PJh5fuflY2f_pFBc2Rf_HhBqPEo7GcTC0uCMtRIolAhqMkrt7AOiUNiMB4Q=&c=-cEXZqSBWNdbx3txv1gBp-fnOQnyEG39YHZ4K2K3e29TFpOOz_aOxg==&ch=SPLamO-i0oYFdIH_XWPgMjN0JVWzqQHdH6YUq1ElVAlNMNjLATy1Ww==), make a plan to vote, and make sure everyone you know gets out and votes.

name: Caitlin O'Dea (Team Kelly)
subject: KELLY LOEFFLER: "THIS IS THE BATTLE OF OUR LIFETIME"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
|

---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, DECEMBER 30, 2020 KELLY LOEFFLER: "THIS IS THE BATTLE OF OUR LIFETIME"
ATLANTA - In case you missed it, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler was [featured](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MPiOzZwm3pnnmyr3sdpxg8Z-tP84pbV2gTAj7leQhI7oDnIDBp9ABpaigmQ-xpKncUakL1Ja0_wfnQKRdV_826nkE5MKc37cwCh4IXHipTP-7U0BuifQdRk1pLTsGUs3r-Nu0w7zKN6Ad2CY9t2NeLx8QS7XnLksNniMT5TcRUXRZrU6KLPETKTEscji6tJJxqQ_dEr-laNvQS1RI5iyFBvZ0k1kCBuYn6pGZX1rz_2I4-BlxNlyk9mXpmXCIM74x6s2xoENjchectkcFy1XmOjaa9yZg3Y2&c=RkaJFsu9FUPeHRLV3rg_qZysgzIVI77Jjute-0Tb3sa-kPOSIkET_g==&ch=QUA5Qtl9JDVwqxif9n3hBkrL1pLb25zTVoFCqGxqSCjgbqM8voepiA==) in an article by the National Review - who joined the campaign on the trail with just days to go until Election Day. As the National Review reports, Senator Loeffler is crisscrossing the state ahead of January 5th \- urging supporters to get out the vote and save America in "the battle of our lifetime." Read excerpts below and the full article [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MPiOzZwm3pnnmyr3sdpxg8Z-tP84pbV2gTAj7leQhI7oDnIDBp9ABpaigmQ-xpKncUakL1Ja0_wfnQKRdV_826nkE5MKc37cwCh4IXHipTP-7U0BuifQdRk1pLTsGUs3r-Nu0w7zKN6Ad2CY9t2NeLx8QS7XnLksNniMT5TcRUXRZrU6KLPETKTEscji6tJJxqQ_dEr-laNvQS1RI5iyFBvZ0k1kCBuYn6pGZX1rz_2I4-BlxNlyk9mXpmXCIM74x6s2xoENjchectkcFy1XmOjaa9yZg3Y2&c=RkaJFsu9FUPeHRLV3rg_qZysgzIVI77Jjute-0Tb3sa-kPOSIkET_g==&ch=QUA5Qtl9JDVwqxif9n3hBkrL1pLb25zTVoFCqGxqSCjgbqM8voepiA==).
..."I'm excited for Kelly," Olla said. "There's a lot of things we like about her. I really feel she'll be good for us. She's not a politician. She doesn't need to have lobbyists' money in her pocket. She can get out there and do her job without being bribed." ..."I have a question for you," Loeffler says at the beginning of each speech. "Are you ready to keep fighting for President Trump and show America that Georgia is a red state?" She lays out what is at stake if Democrats take over the Senate: higher taxes, open borders, defunded police departments, the Green New Deal. And it's not just radical ideas, "It's a radical candidate like my opponent, radical liberal Raphael Warnock," who she says doesn't support police officers or the military, and who refuses to denounce socialism. She condemns cancel culture, fake news, and the thought police. She supports reforming health-care and also covering pre-existing conditions. She's pro-life and pro-school choice. "This is about our kids. This is about future generations," she says. ..."This is the battle of our lifetime right now," Loeffler told a crowd of about 40 people gathered in the Republican headquarters in Paulding County on Tuesday afternoon. "It's happening in Georgia. I could not be more proud that it's happening in Georgia."
..."The fact that she was not involved in politics makes her more marketable," Fitzgerald, the former policeman, said. "You want people that are outsiders. A lot of people, they talk badly against her because she is [wealthy]. So is Trump, and they all support him."
..."She's a Republican. She's a conservative. She's got the same values in life that I've got," Altwies said. "If she doesn't get caught up in the swamp, then I'll be a happy camper."
---

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Last chance to vote early, Georgia!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa332/34a064cc/1d0890fe/70202cd/2722245398/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - As 2020 comes to an end, so will early in-person early voting in Georgia. **Make your plan to get to the polls and vote early before they close!** Some counties in Georgia will have early voting locations up and running tomorrow, December 30 and Thursday, December 31. However, some counties (like Cobb!) will close polling locations early on Thursday while others (like Fulton!) do not have in-person early voting at all on Thursday. Check to see where and when you can vote early in your county by visiting [iwillvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa332/34a064cc/1d0890fe/70202ca/2722245398/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/"). And when you head to the polls, don't forget to take [an acceptable form of identification](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa332/34a064cc/1d0890fe/70202cb/2722245398/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://sos.ga.gov/index.php/elections/georgia_voter_identification_requirements2") with you! **Can 't vote early in person?** You can vote on Tuesday, January 5 from 7am to 7pm. Your polling place likely differs from your early voting location options, so be sure to double check your Election Day polling place by going to [iwillvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa332/34a064cc/1d0890fe/70202ca/2722245398/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/") or calling the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816. **Received your mail ballot but haven 't returned it in yet? **Don't wait any longer! Your ballot must be received by your county before 7pm on Tuesday, January 5. Follow the instructions and complete it now-- and don't forget to sign the oath on the outside of the envelope! Then, find a drop box location in your county at [iwillvote.com/locate](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa332/34a064cc/1d0890fe/70202c8/2722245398/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/locate/") (most counties have them) or return it to your county elections office. Once you return your ballot, check out [georgia.ballottrax.net/voter](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa332/34a064cc/1d0890fe/70202c9/2722245398/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://georgia.ballottrax.net/voter/") to make sure your ballot has been received. **Requested a ballot but haven 't received it?** You can vote early in person or on Election Day! Just tell the person at the check-in table that you wish to cancel your requested ballot and vote in person. There isn't much time left, so make your plan to vote in Georgia's U.S. Senate and Public Service Commission runoff elections now. After you vote, [tell us about your voting experience](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa332/34a064cc/1d0890fe/70202d6/2722245398/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSesRsAhJ9dBbyXI-sWwQJ2MiLWM3co9vyXSzCK0aMvvxBVu8g/viewform")! If you have any questions or need help, please call the Voter Protection hotline at 888-730-5816. You can also find more information at [peachvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa332/34a064cc/1d0890fe/70202d7/2722245398/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://www.peachvote.com"). \- Team Fair Fight P.S. Have you already voted, and already encouraged everyone you know to vote? Another way you can help is by chipping in a small (or large!), direct contribution to Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock. [Click here](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa332/34a064cc/1d0890fe/70202d4/2722245398/VEsP/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgiasenate?refcode=IE123020RWO") to chip in and split a donation between the two! |
---|---|---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa332/34a064cc/1d0890fe/70202d5/2722245398/VEsHBQ/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa332/34a064cc/1d0890fe/70202d2/2722245398/VEsHBA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa332/34a064cc/1d0890fe/70202d3/2722245398/VEsHBw/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

1270 Caroline Street

Atlanta, GA 30307

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Fight for Trump: Call this Judge and tell him to assign the GA lawsuit
body:
| |
---
Can I count on you to help President Trump?

We are trying to get a hearing for President Trump’s legal challenge to the results of the November general election in Georgia.

We filed the lawsuit weeks ago. It’s comprehensive, and it’s comprehensively documented – with more than 1,500 pages of affidavits from eyewitnesses testifying to violations of dozens of different Georgia laws.

But Judge Christopher Brasher, the Chief Judge of the Superior Court of Fulton County, has yet to assign the case to an administrative judge in another circuit, who will then assign the case.

Some suggest Chief Judge Brasher is deliberately stalling, in hopes he can delay the proceedings beyond Joe Biden’s inauguration. Then the Chief Judge could declare the lawsuit “moot,” and shut it down entirely.

I don’t know what his motivation is. I just know he has not yet done his job, weeks have gone by, and justice delayed is justice denied.

This is a matter of interest to those of us in Georgia, obviously, but it’s also important to any American voter who shares our concerns over the integrity of the November election in Georgia. So don’t think that just because you don’t live in Georgia, you don’t have a horse in this race. You do.

**Here’s my request – would you call Chief Judge Brasher at(404) 612-4518 and say, _“Please assign the case of the Trump legal challenge to the Georgia election results to an administrative judge in another circuit immediately. Stop delaying.”_**

We’re not asking him to do anything extraordinary, we’re just asking him to do his job and let the case move forward.

For weeks, President Trump’s critics and opponents have been gleefully saying that court after court and judge after judge have shot down the president’s legal challenges. But none of them have even seen the evidence offered. That’s all we’re asking for – we just want to be able to present the evidence we’ve gathered in a court of law, and then let the chips fall where they may.

We cannot do that until Chief Judge Brasher does his job, and assigns this case to an administrative judge in another circuit. And we need your help to make it happen.

Please, it will take you just a few moments. **Call Chief Judge Brasher at(404) 612-4518 and ask him to please assign an administrative judge in another circuit to the case of the Trump legal challenge to the Georgia election results.**

We’re grateful for your support on this issue, and for everything you’ve done to help defend our Constitutional liberties. It’s patriots like you that make our work possible, and we never forget that.

Thank you for your time, and, I hope, your call to Chief Judge Brasher.

In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin

But Judge Christopher Brasher, the Chief Judge of the Superior Court of Fulton County, has yet to assign the case to an administrative judge in another circuit, who will then assign the case. Some suggest Chief Judge Brasher is deliberately stalling, in hopes he can delay the proceedings beyond Joe Biden’s inauguration. Then the Chief Judge could declare the lawsuit “moot,” and shut it down entirely. I don’t know what his motivation is. I just know he has not yet done his job, weeks have gone by, and justice delayed is justice denied. This is a matter of interest to those of us in Georgia, obviously, but it’s also important to any American voter who shares our concerns over the integrity of the November election in Georgia. So don’t think that just because you don’t live in Georgia, you don’t have a horse in this race. You do. Here’s my request – would you call Chief Judge Brasher at(404) 612-4518 and say, “Please assign the case of the Trump legal challenge to the Georgia election results to an administrative judge in another circuit immediately. Stop delaying.” We’re not asking him to do anything extraordinary, we’re just asking him to do his job and let the case move forward. For weeks, President Trump’s critics and opponents have been gleefully saying that court after court and judge after judge have shot down the president’s legal challenges. But none of them have even seen the evidence offered. That’s all we’re asking for – we just want to be able to present the evidence we’ve gathered in a court of law, and then let the chips fall where they may. We cannot do that until Chief Judge Brasher does his job, and assigns this case to an administrative judge in another circuit. And we need your help to make it happen. Please, it will take you just a few moments. Call Chief Judge Brasher at(404) 612-4518 and ask him to please assign an administrative judge in another circuit to the case of the Trump legal challenge to the Georgia election results. We’re grateful for your support on this issue, and for everything you’ve done to help defend our Constitutional liberties. It’s patriots like you that make our work possible, and we never forget that. Thank you for your time, and, I hope, your call to Chief Judge Brasher. In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin | Tea Party Patriots Action operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. © 2020 80 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003 |

name: Mike Siegel
subject: Please support my favorite organization of 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress
body:
Sunrise is leading a national movement to address climate change. They were instrumental in my campaign and helped progressives win key races across the country. Please consider supporting their work in 2021.

|
---

| | Dear friends, My 2020 campaign had many high notes. We recruited a volunteer army of over 5,000 people, built a broad coalition that crossed race, geography, class and political orientation, and elevated a number of critical issues into the public conversation. Dozens of groups were part of this effort. **One of the most important, and one I’d like you to consider supporting with a year-end gift, is **[**the Sunrise Movement**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/23209424/266862263/-468695279?refcode=20201229_email_100k-100days_mike-siegel&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWFjOThlMS1jMzRhLWViMTEtYTYwNy0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NzPXshBuHhgOcTzY5so8VKO6qka7AFZzqcIrnH8LQf8=)**.** Sunrise is a youth-led organization devoted to combating climate change. They are responsible for bringing the idea of a “Green New Deal” into the national conversation. They built a diverse coalition that not only educates the public about the urgency of moving from fossil fuels to renewable energy, but also does the work. Sunrise recruited hundreds of volunteers to my campaign who collectively made hundreds of thousands of phone calls. They helped me win the Democratic nomination and elevated my candidacy into the national conversation. They produced a beautiful campaign ad and inspired countless others to join the cause. [**You can support the Sunrise Movement’s work with a donation today**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/23209425/266862264/-468695279?refcode=20201229_email_100k-100days_mike-siegel&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWFjOThlMS1jMzRhLWViMTEtYTYwNy0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NzPXshBuHhgOcTzY5so8VKO6qka7AFZzqcIrnH8LQf8=)**.** The teenagers and 20-somethings of the Sunrise Movement helped elect progressives across the country in 2020, including some of my favorite rising stars in Congress like Jamaal Bowman and Cori Bush. Now they are working with President-elect Biden to ensure that climate change is one of our top national priorities. The first 100 days of the Biden Administration will be essential to make real change to protect our planet. [Please donate today to ensure the climate movement is at the table](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/23209426/266862265/-468695279?refcode=20201229_email_100k-100days_mike-siegel&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWFjOThlMS1jMzRhLWViMTEtYTYwNy0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NzPXshBuHhgOcTzY5so8VKO6qka7AFZzqcIrnH8LQf8=). Thank you, with love and solidarity, Mike P.S. To show just one example of the great work of Sunrise, [here’s the ad they produced for my campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/23209427/266862266/-803653937?v=GOgRw4cRm5k&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWFjOThlMS1jMzRhLWViMTEtYTYwNy0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NzPXshBuHhgOcTzY5so8VKO6qka7AFZzqcIrnH8LQf8=&emci=9fe47784-bf4a-eb11-a607-00155d43c992&emdi=8eac98e1-c34a-eb11-a607-00155d43c992&ceid=6233172). I hope you will help them continue their work in 2021.
---

name: True the Vote
subject: NEW Podcast: Breaking! On the Ground in Georgia
body:
| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=354A834A20A3718)
---
| | |
---
| | This week on Red White & True News... Breaking! On the Ground in Georgia
---
| | In the latest episode of the [Red White & True News podcast](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=354A834A20A3731), True the Vote Founder Catherine Engelbrecht discusses Validate the Vote Georgia and what is playing out in the Georgia Senate runoff elections. As citizens, we have far more power than we think. Citizens are the core of this country and there are so many things that we can do to take action.
Georgia Elector Challenges
In 2010, one of TTV's first projects was the citizen challenge – an opportunity for voters to take action and draw attention to the election process. That helped us form a path to our recent efforts with Elector Challenges in Georgia. [True the Vote partnered with Georgians across the state to identify 364,541 Elector Challenges](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=354A834A20A3732). An Elector Challenge is a unique feature in Georgia law (GA. CODE ANN. § 21-2-230), allowing a voter to challenge the eligibility of any other voters in his or her county if probable cause exists to show that the challenged voter does not meet the qualifications legally required to cast a ballot.

Click the image below to watch the full episode:

---
| | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=354A834A20A3731)
---
| |
As expected, the coordinated leftist machine continues to sabotage Georgia's election integrity. Liberal election lawyer Marc Elias and his allies are [spreading misinformation, bullying, and intimidating Georgia ](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=354A834A20A3736)[county election boards and citizen challengers.](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=354A834A20A3736)
This week, a U.S. judge – Obama appointee and sister of former Georgia Gubernatorial candidate Stacey Abrams – [issued a temporary restraining order](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=354A834A20A3733) preventing two counties from accepting elector challenges. Judge Abrams Gardner blatantly refused to recuse herself from the case despite her sister Stacey Abrams' clear personal interest in the outcome of the proceeding. Abrams is a top advocate for lawless election changes that open doors for election abuse and fraud.

True the Vote will not surrender. We will not quit. We will not be silent. Nor should you. This is about every eligible American voter's opportunity to have their voices heard loudly and clearly. Now is the time to stand up.
If you live in Georgia, make sure you vote to have your voice heard!
If you see something, say something. Use our Election Integrity Hotline, [GAValidatetheVote.org](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=354A834A20A3734) or 855-702-0702.
Click below to listen or [watch a video of the podcast ](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=354A834A20A3731)on our YouTube page.

name: Brittni McGuire
subject: chickens, rice, and caviar
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

Friend,

What do chickens, rice, and caviar have in common? Nothing – I just needed a subject line that would help this email stand out.
I’m writing today because the WVDP needs your help meeting our end of the year goal. We’re still $1,280 short and we only have until tomorrow at midnight. Can you chip in and help us get there? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
This past election has highlighted just how important early, on-the-ground, voter registration programs are. They can win an election. That’s why the WVDP is starting early, so we can continue the momentum Democratic voters showed these past several months. We need to make sure we can reach as many unregistered West Virginia Democrats as possible. Will you help us? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Thank you!
Brittni McGuire, Communications Director, WVDP
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

clean_body: [] Friend, What do chickens, rice, and caviar have in common? Nothing – I just needed a subject line that would help this email stand out. I’m writing today because the WVDP needs your help meeting our end of the year goal. We’re still $1,280 short and we only have until tomorrow at midnight. Can you chip in and help us get there? [] This past election has highlighted just how important early, on-the-ground, voter registration programs are. They can win an election. That’s why the WVDP is starting early, so we can continue the momentum Democratic voters showed these past several months. We need to make sure we can reach as many unregistered West Virginia Democrats as possible. Will you help us? [] secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [secure.actblue.com/donate/wv] Thank you! Brittni McGuire, Communications Director, WVDP [] Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www.wvdems.org). body:
Now with Oakland's Kamala Harris in the White House and San Francisco's Nancy Pelosi's controlling the House Majority... %%First Name%%, we can't sit back and let them do to America what they and the rest of the Far Left have done to California.
****

.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fT1AJWAIRhtHY1p-LLqeDbZA3qxOB-boN1IvuOhbzRsg5XNq4oMF3UkTkofk5i0LN_kbYkhj6Z_8KzwQ3Q27cVRPLGNH_wkS56TebF0MfdVcH_a9A2Z7qRXlzdKMkWPnTLw9kcETko5GjtNug5bQta1s8iA9dHUqo8Gj8FK_M5JlhlWIjDQY81SuAZL5FwTdSf8vAHBViIA4ODhqYFcUVHX5i6DKzj-QzhHr4QpfUANVaMcx-hPsW-Z9LeXkOX7J3xfks0zTyZTMYEEqztQgMOnjJcSMG2glgu_flhQlfJ5d7hkQHHcsy1Jl9ceT1loMq9eeCoTVSiT__RXVe6pVnKd4s3fKVcuS4Z1G5ZuB_IIgVQBmWQ5R-LFtQnDCRGwPMC4WdG5GvcamuaAHY5d6FC5hCHWRrh5MmFHK7fb4Dy_FOYlqEqr4EbvdcvtUpXqv&c=TeeTRVfhCHsyMIuY_wpl5Abyp-w4mai17NJ-gwLJLBpPdwL_zVRiyA==&ch=kWNiBrravmYXVZCo-EOaVjlUDJsDIsfI3jW4dAIdwa_bI3Fece3bFw==)
Here in California, we've seen what happens when the Democrats' socialist agenda goes unchallenged:

_Taxes skyrocket. Cost of living skyrockets. Thousands of jobs are destroyed overnight. Business -- and the jobs they create -- flee the burdensome regulations and excessive red tape. Lifelong residents are forced to move out of state simply to make ends meet._

Now with Oakland's Kamala Harris in the White House and San Francisco's Nancy Pelosi's controlling the House Majority... [**Friend, we can 't sit back and let them do to America what they and the rest of the Far Left have done to California.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fT1AJWAIRhtHY1p-LLqeDbZA3qxOB-boN1IvuOhbzRsg5XNq4oMF3abadQXgOJF_2YsDXBRmAUizkA_KJAE0rS5aChMcTlQhKeL0oh5z79_5S7hZoe3FlchMxhoH3upOM3oglcPk2qHD8CP8lsRhVYEVg9n6nc-BGJ2BN_wdc5NB5gEwUTQ3QeUAafjLXTHOgGpafcWjyWXfhRyPTkKB0owvBYOU0XL-e4TAbya5fdgSKnLf3srdDoOL4DCxiNN-OCC7wrkaf1efMs21hbndSEeXW4QrTTojVIbQ_ImTM585Fkq4CshQGgNsrNeX5fQnpoz4zO-YkROlwFKGgcl_iUm4pNsPcFGj6Mh5_exroFfHc9_K3t3dURmQrZoce7LhLZv71eBk1PHcgMz68nRmS-F5j7UWxzLXqnkULUTgwmuQ0-Pjtz5CSJtUA4rZPZTY&c=TeeTRVfhCHsyMIuY_wpl5Abyp-w4mai17NJ-gwLJLBpPdwL_zVRiyA==&ch=kWNiBrravmYXVZCo-EOaVjlUDJsDIsfI3jW4dAIdwa_bI3Fece3bFw==)

Pelosi's Majority is the smallest it's been in decades -- giving us one shot to take back the House for Republicans and restore a common-sense, conservative agenda in Washington. There are only a handful of seats to flip, and a long, tough road ahead of us, but [**with all hands on deck, victory is ours.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fT1AJWAIRhtHY1p-LLqeDbZA3qxOB-boN1IvuOhbzRsg5XNq4oMF3abadQXgOJF_2YsDXBRmAUizkA_KJAE0rS5aChMcTlQhKeL0oh5z79_5S7hZoe3FlchMxhoH3upOM3oglcPk2qHD8CP8lsRhVYEVg9n6nc-BGJ2BN_wdc5NB5gEwUTQ3QeUAafjLXTHOgGpafcWjyWXfhRyPTkKB0owvBYOU0XL-e4TAbya5fdgSKnLf3srdDoOL4DCxiNN-OCC7wrkaf1efMs21hbndSEeXW4QrTTojVIbQ_ImTM585Fkq4CshQGgNsrNeX5fQnpoz4zO-YkROlwFKGgcl_iUm4pNsPcFGj6Mh5_exroFfHc9_K3t3dURmQrZoce7LhLZv71eBk1PHcgMz68nRmS-F5j7UWxzLXqnkULUTgwmuQ0-Pjtz5CSJtUA4rZPZTY&c=TeeTRVfhCHsyMIuY_wpl5Abyp-w4mai17NJ-gwLJLBpPdwL_zVRiyA==&ch=kWNiBrravmYXVZCo-EOaVjlUDJsDIsfI3jW4dAIdwa_bI3Fece3bFw==)

subject: Outspent in Georgia with less than one week left

body:
We need your help to close the gap and take back the Senate.
Hi there, with control of the Senate on the line, we knew these two runoff races in Georgia would get expensive.
**The GOP is spending over $168 million in ads here -- they are outspending us on ads by $67 MILLION!!**
**Voters in Georgia are already heading to the polls and we have less than ONE WEEK to get out every vote. We need to close that gap NOW before we fall further behind.**
[**We can 't risk letting baseless attack ads from Mitch McConnell and his far-right friends drown out our message to Georgia voters. Can you RUSH a donation of $3 or more to help us keep pace?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc7b1/2a380d31/21c308c1/f056c2/816449147/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0b3Nzb2ZmIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDEyMzBfb3Nzb2ZmX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4ossoff?refcode=e20201230_ossoff_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

And he is too much of a coward to come out and debate me. He refused to show up to our debate and face the people of Georgia -- he simply pleaded the fifth.
But he's got a GOP war chest of upward of $168 million flooding the airwaves supporting him and Kelly Loeffler and trying to distract Georgia voters from his disastrous Senate tenure.
**The people of this state and this country need solutions in the midst of this crisis.[Please chip in $3 or more to help me defeat David Perdue and win Democrats control of the Senate.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc7b1/2a380d31/21c308c1/f056c2/816449147/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0b3Nzb2ZmIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDEyMzBfb3Nzb2ZmX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4ossoff?refcode=e20201230_ossoff_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**

Jon

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: My New Year's Resolution
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
As we cap off this difficult year, I'm excited to start fresh in 2021 and continue the challenging but essential process of getting Rhode Island vaccinated against COVID-19.
I made this short video to talk about my New Year's Resolution for 2021.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zRJD99YBLNgupFEteLmTzh996pXNgjkQktyRCgA4YkTcWPhJxA-hieOvgCjC0-jcumke7hVQK3YuYkxYS7TO1ZnryBGJLa3BdT9BcPapHk1Shv5EiWvRdWWhGmmtSEqQ7U9E_G6dF0v5Tb2MSJas1w==&c=N4RDby0I9_b9zSIOWI3LfaRQxJeisEVkMVW8aiRMx4doOinQcUj_Pg==&ch=JkxmAgq_lrHMgie4qw0MRyULYebEHcW6DhOv8_KvMYcF4w3DN5YIOQ==)
---
| This year has been tough for all Rhode Island businesses, so next year, my family and I are going to try harder to shop local, support neighborhood businesses, and do what we can to help the economy rebuild one small business at a time. Shopping local has always been a priority, but it's more important now than ever.
From my family to yours, wishing all Rhode Islanders a happy and healthy new year.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. subject: It's not too late…
body:

| |

|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

The clock is ticking down on 2020, but there is still time to help Judicial Watch with a tax-deductible gift!

**Will you commit yourself to the rule of law by **[**making a year-end contribution to Judicial Watch now**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52461&L=21610&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzU/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1NYXkmdXRtX3Rlcm09Tm9uLURvbm9ycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTIzMDE1NTUxNg==)**?**

Your support will help us continue:
* **Uncovering** the facts behind Biden family influence peddling schemes in Ukraine and China;
* **Exposing** the illicit Deep State conspiracy targeting President Trump;
* **Fighting** for honest elections across the country;
* **Suing** sanctuary cities that protect illegal aliens contrary to federal law;
* **Holding** corrupt politicians accountable;
* **Educating** the American people about the dangers of out-of-control government secrecy.

[**Please make your best tax-deductible year-end gift today!**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52461&L=21610&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzU/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1NYXkmdXRtX3Rlcm09Tm9uLURvbm9ycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTIzMDE1NTUxNg==)

Thank you...and Happy New Year!
Yours truly,

name: Terry
subject: Amanda Chase and Trump’s last stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOTwlw0Im2jV1TagL4-lwRK2E7UKfzHYPQwC2N5sRkB3ELdvui8nVmulL_FrC9A1FH_LMb0g8YZF1AFo2vfaeL2UKm525Dvm47lZXZr_zq8HvjTriqCSp_O2Ra1Kuz4v3PgP6cG0pvkC3fBvA8dRe9wIB_QKvonbX2UzOW-7NiKCo5W4hpGOlWEoYqE1sOM69wa-LD1RZCtt4o-632YijGGW69oYepGnDXbYr_L04ifSg2K671GXoEc1N-PVtmuYg8USjnUCUzUl3MekIJ7XRzwgIy6arLoFFq9apygEXYfWca4uIXn4kVq0jW3ZR4ZpDoA/385/bodyyuIrSoWOz7UqWVcZ5g/h0/xOa_-egoPaU97H7ebd5xJ1966Jb-cTfaqWBAE6S2mS0)
**[We can’t let a radical like Amanda Chase take Virginia back. Chip-in before midnight and your contribution will be 100% matched.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOTwlw0Im2jV1TagL4-lwRK2IV9RldVmsNBB8y5oQkhSEN2VCK6l-UsjRQVLYu2vpXzA4dxhAc4_IOolLoKGkyOMqvQ8XMMWMrvU2CLKXWbDrAgCB4XRLA6Z8eTQnQrN4lb2oD8k0V3ngclzybUDJluibdYITkEXTnhLTkUAEZSOEsEhdmJm4t8DcNNsdg9Ol1G1fQ9Qrae1WwamQs-o_W50Rbd_b7IjNAwOKiHxiT7IxR43M7dYXW-DD4EmiErmNGyFhbkegGiw4YyXr7p--flFBardpiNZ_-B_C31B-763i5iHaNXifxMcgKrVfyBblng/385/bodyyuIrSoWOz7UqWVcZ5g/h1/XpKqSSC46FxcPLtNQZ0uSdCgdMKuLVm8YVy_w66vVD0)** Derek, **** Historic voter turnout. Zero evidence of voter fraud. In a year where many things went wrong, democracy in America wasn’t one of them. Of course, don’t tell that to Donald Trump and Amanda Chase. Incredibly, Trump still won’t concede. And his biggest fan, leading Republican Governor candidate Amanda Chase, is calling on Trump to keep power by declaring martial law. **Now, Trump and Chase are urging supporters to protest the Electoral College vote next week in Washington, D.C.** _Some are calling the protests “Trump’s last stand.”_ The good news is that no matter what these clowns do, Joe Biden will be our next President. The bad news is that, even after Donald Trump is gone, Amanda Chase will still be a leading candidate to win the Republican nomination for Governor. Look, in 2020, Virginians stood together and rejected Donald Trump’s politics of hate. But we’re not done yet. In 2021, Virginia Democrats must come together to stop right-wing Virginia Republicans like Amanda Chase from becoming Virginia’s next Governor. **I will defeat radicals in the Virginia GOP -- I've done it time and again. I can win, but I can’t do it alone.** **[Please, chip-in anything you can afford right now and help me build a winning campaign. If you donate before midnight tonight, your contribution will be 100% matched.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOTwlw0Im2jV1TagL4-lwRK3en-zTQi8j7MzzBj3vMo1cmDsGAOO1FtlB1Iig6hz9p6hLxaIcENPTZdV8dqPyu6gfNcCISecIqNKGsn7YkWXh3tjSd8OBGXZslxt58KDpV8RqATvredMVE5aRqknpMCORGfOoylZ0ZofK4ZXRqt-Q0LjXvxx2-bBXyvOkbcxUlutUHLvOBIG1zC-jewc5HvvQ7FkYvRsyiXULziVFlYNExNdKfNApoVGBOlO_nDcseu4M2_lo9kSstsN3gycSKa8mMZeTtIzA5LUsNNecDM1qXZu54S6b-__KC9TGPmbDyQ/385/bodyyuIrSoWOz7UqWVcZ5g/h2/xIq2iryo2wdw3_Csy5_i93P9VpwM-T5tVRDduFoZiJA)** Thanks, Terry McAuliffe
| [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOTwlw0Im2jV1TagL4-lwRK3_JqibReSDRS9J3bjgDo_NwyJZt7i2SGzeF7ZNuMUmdhYljsKTPumqRUo_I620fYJvR9Ajq8BDHdnh_ztaccUXYMg0qPcYnijnBnCI5QthPkHa9OlV2YlGvUbt6IpECdr_nP666705U9ogpcHDrfffZqB37eeRKYzxm-OVmDBPcsuhIDp8ok76BSotW7xSFHUiBLHG234YPqsPlc1DBeBSMIU-9Ldl9E_Zwg_Uu-vcQf7V7ZD7BtsHEiertgWUd0t4JNVWQuErGBoO18OF8PEowduSuOmZ97ooxxEvJUM5rA/385/bodyyuIrSoWOz7UqWVcZ5g/h3/yWku1i4GgqDV-oxLLUXN03I1tw5PSy1rWwcit3iQS8I)

name: Nancy Mace
subject: Friend, I’m gearing up for the next fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |
body:
We’ve been challenged and put to the test by 2020, but there’s a bright future ahead of us and 2021 is a chance for us to turn the page and start a... [ ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=b019bb0050cf447bb3629f0e55e36470&_e=5Rh81B1pgu2CWvF2Z3r3Dp8WBSBNPsqYTugGFDvQerj5FxOe9IMumgwJrWWbd5QSokqlHbgAvg550fSqBnn5WnRJcTDFtgGcfKl5SUtQnVx31ML1Tv79n5C7R1HwPfyVp5OdnAX8LgHY2gMUMf41vxPqqUi-_dPl34i6zLx7sZEh6le4S7o_l-PQibpYzbd15QoVWGmvKT74VbvqtAEa1kEIH9vXvuJyVLNcQ3BwJHqP6Ujvku-gzPIu32tTsPAPHyuSVKk5Z5kkbQJngcsEt18YytqMXz4d8y3T6fXajWtuWx7E-tyF9ntH-4OxH3fZnsop5DL8rIzaCjhj5EsjHKdGXKBjiif42GPi3iYl9zjj1BLfoCyHpiF3xADJiogw6JK_zOcSuvAVgPLYsNbzF_UINfWBMwaWqSKCxR0YLn_m3hqXlb-2Qc5yOZmVt_D4Uw95duiLvp3ldwc26_DNqFeg1KrD4AIAgHsrtzG8V_M%3D) Hey friend \- it’s Nancy. Have a second? It’s been quite the year, and all across the Lowcountry people are exhaling with relief because they know it’s almost over. We’ve been challenged and put to the test by 2020, but there’s a bright future ahead and 2021 is a chance for us to turn the page and start a new chapter. Despite the tragedy and hardship of the last 12 months, the Lowcountry has persevered. We’ve shown off our toughness, our compassion, and our resilient, never-give-up nature, time and time again. I couldn’t be more proud of our district, and I’m beyond excited to see what the next year will bring. _For me personally, 2021 promises to be full of new challenges — it’ll be my first year in Congress, and trust me, there’s a lot of work to be done to get Capitol Hill back to work for the American people._ I’m determined to put the Lowcountry First and deliver results for the families, workers, small businesses, and veterans of our district. It’s going to take a lot of hard work, but we’re going to come back stronger than ever. **I’m going to be 100% focused on delivering results for our district on Capitol Hill, but my team also needs to get ready for a challenge in 2022.** Our seat will be one of the Democrats’ top targets, and I can’t take anything for granted. I’m reaching out right now because I’m going to be counting on you to help me get ready for this challenge — we need to hit the ground running in 2021 to keep this seat red. Friend, if we have any chance of ending Nancy Pelosi’s reign of incompetence and turning the House red in 2022, we need to hold onto our district. **[Can I count on you to help me hit the ground running in 2021?](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=b019bb0050cf447bb3629f0e55e36470&_e=5Rh81B1pgu2CWvF2Z3r3Dp8WBSBNPsqYTugGFDvQerj5FxOe9IMumgwJrWWbd5QSokqlHbgAvg550fSqBnn5WnRJcTDFtgGcfKl5SUtQnVx31ML1Tv79n5C7R1HwPfyVp5OdnAX8LgHY2gMUMf41vxPqqUi-_dPl34i6zLx7sZEh6le4S7o_l-PQibpYzbd15QoVWGmvKT74VbvqtAEa1kEIH9vXvuJyVLNcQ3BwJHqP6Ujvku-gzPIu32tTsPAPHyuSVKk5Z5kkbQJngcsEt_NeqfYsrotxnah1K3bPzD5FvvYwx0WnWaUEvM73eE-rUwbn7wO5PxClgPy6ATWa1pwug1NqiPYW89cP7o_HEbEMeEpCzapmsog_dsJKoPH4wMtOTFr9_HK0dYSjP41JujgwkelCTcIetUdjcJMpYrvWHJvQM7sA4Hud89VALfA4H1ScdjYNVGVAt0pZrhJdjoyPC_p_hrzu1j2UPcOGx1I%3D)** **Donate here:[https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/action-1840665/dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=b019bb0050cf447bb3629f0e55e36470&_e=5Rh81B1pgu2CWvF2Z3r3Dp8WBSBNPsqYTugGFDvQerj5FxOe9IMumgwJrWWbd5QSokqlHbgAvg550fSqBnn5WnRJcTDFtgGcfKl5SUtQnVx31ML1Tv79n5C7R1HwPfyVp5OdnAX8LgHY2gMUMf41vxPqqUi-_dPl34i6zLx7sZEh6le4S7o_l-PQibpYzbd15QoVWGmvKT74VbvqtAEa1kEIH9vXvuJyVLNcQ3BwJHqP6Ujvku-gzPIu32tTsPAPHyuSVKk5Z5kkbQJngcsEtx6miUKMXr1uPLRtkdtL22fdNneQwH8j5pFh_hI7Mk_aK49O2EUfzeh0ESshb68u8MFNHHaRYThuv7j98WiVd0DmOMS26RVlIJ3ei9rDQitilMphfkOjsyLGdRwez1W4Qa-tH8TowWRlpBB_XZwj7zNertlvzUl3ya2hqFhCi3WsysARhVD5A6kQ-VeN8E3M8q0UEyVWVAFi_4KZam1r4Lk%3D)** Thank you for your support, Nancy Mace |

| | This week I sent a note regarding a huge hurdle we’re facing in a few days: a fundraising blackout required by state law during the legislative session. This will give our opponents a head start to outraise us in our re-election campaign, so we set an ambitious goal to raise $25,000 before the blackout begins. I just checked with my team -- and I’m proud to say that _we have received an outpouring of support over the last 48 hours and already reached 52% of our fundraising goal!_ National Republicans have spent tens of millions of dollars to flip Nevada red because they’re largely funded by GOP mega-donors and right-wing super PACs. The reality is: we don’t have that advantage. **But I’m proud to fight with this team -- a group of grassroots activists who are dedicated to keeping Battleground Nevada BLUE.** This is a critical goal for our campaign, so I’m humbly reaching out again to ask for your help -- **[_if you haven’t had a chance to donate, please consider chipping in $25, $15, or any amount you can before the blackout begins on January 2nd:_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRt3jlCQA7GjIoNjXSjTpNiOYFCm6NIXFAU28Em3RcPMgTba2hYrZxjn44EP4TPAGQ9cxoOflhIwnqZyC84EvsQfVLSELT6kYBEEZq4MmspbzSCJ-tvgLgWZRj-INuD8WdoRD5tAv0Ko4F5DZRfxosQzo9GrcMnIM9055zleuwQXnbp5aeiKTIZCTFw0-mgdIix34SPb6EKcJRsnGLRi6h-4VkAPPEZU1vksbfTZjUAu6jcAICpWOaqMEkhFWCkNheZu-NeG4bLlhterASeAucdRk-JdIPlZV5RGRB33laXF5wYPhHJicFKo3x7F7UNLAUHUAttMwqIlVwJ6-NfbwRctGD4BHVfCw6v6fOSCAEnewYl7Sl2RcgThwql0Kw_WCAX/385/CvykM1jPQ86hNQEIa1WtGw/h1/OIyQEAK0aWPLqWX1NEYCRhhQOZkMTvVKHpBK4DlKmjo)** | | | [Chip in $25 >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRt3jlCQA7GjIoNjXSjTpNiOYFCm6NIXFAU28Em3RcPMgTba2hYrZxjn44EP4TPAGQ9cxoOflhIwnqZyC84EvsQfVLSELT6kYBEEZq4MmspbzT6F_xh3vNaqAnvysLrfNwZDC90rvq9O_d8Qf_2qOroohf9DJwHna94_kcSZ4cL_FPVa9jsFUIqvPR8h9-bCbdHtpn7Sjr_GQnlfaAUu1ZAn6wkRJF-DmR5GrDTuZDOyCfwAlAZu9SFIsjl_WS-HiXYePOykPyeTAcZd4lvdNVycgthczGz4eFGAKfdgpq-JLW9SSXaTf0wzdTo-ft7NmRTXrRz_D3CDIU067JKMT3hLmOQCJonNTZHucLZsNn4nCbTDyxYEpRZ3jXDmqY9qk7X/385/CvykM1jPQ86hNQEIa1WtGw/h2/VvwuzykH_L_W-VNxJapXZH4HyG0fd0i7BE9BQ9CPVzg)

clean_body: | | | | | This week I sent a note regarding a huge hurdle we’re facing in a few days: a fundraising blackout required by state law during the legislative session. This will give our opponents a head start to outraise us in our re-election campaign, so we set an ambitious goal to raise $25,000 before the blackout begins. I just checked with my team -- and I’m proud to say that we have received an outpouring of support over the last 48 hours and already reached 52% of our fundraising goal! National Republicans have spent tens of millions of dollars to flip Nevada red because they’re largely funded by GOP mega-donors and right-wing super PACs. The reality is: we don’t have that advantage. But I’m proud to fight with this team -- a group of grassroots activists who are dedicated to keeping Battleground Nevada BLUE. This is a critical goal for our campaign, so I’m humbly reaching out again to ask for your help -- | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for being part of this team. \-- Steve Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for by Steve Sisolak for Governor Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, DECEMBER 30, 2020
PHOTO RELEASE: KELLY LOEFFLER CRISS-CROSSES STATE FOR CAMPAIGN STOPS
ATLANTA - Today, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler criss-crossed the state for three campaign stops to encourage early voting. She kicked off the morning with a strong crowd in Macon before heading to Savannah and Augusta for two more stops. All of these events, part of Senator Loeffler's Senate Firewall Tour, drew dozens of supporters who are fired up and excited to elect a political outsider who will work for them in Washington. Find your polling location [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vUU3jXaThTcTojm7r3lQDWhtPNlB5SQeamx2ZYd0ZXBI2dgi_w1PDrbVk0stxAFz3mIAwCXDY7kAJQeH2FRE7kg_l2un750YxW22AraFyHwX-bvG6y9urVNfWp_i0G58QSXPKM8Q9MV0FDkIc5o16Khxq-rpSFQITebqXVEhvLc=&c=A8cpvleqAbk3n1x2FTZB0qFLim0mF4C7kDEAje8wmpOYN3_u4IJx3Q==&ch=EnNY6HyqtBO0qgQggNrmPIOwUBmaQQ21qrHTedVAlewD7OV5lCt_lQ==), make a plan to vote, and remind five friends to do the same.

body:

|
---
| Folks,
**Today could be your last chance to vote early. Check your early voting location’s hours[ here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=e604dff210&e=02cd889ad3)**, make a plan, and get to the polls – it’s never been more important, and if we don’t vote, they win.
It’s not a stretch, and it can’t be said enough: **the soul of America hangs in the balance of this election.** YOUR VOTE is the only thing stonewalling socialism from encroaching on our beloved freedom.
**Now is the time. The eyes of America are upon us. It’s up to us, Georgia. **
**GO VOTE.**
\- Team Perdue

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: How Indiana Republicans Continue to Defy Expectations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Thinking back to my days playing college basketball, I always wanted to defy expectations. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/hiring-trump-supporters-in-indiana-470121?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| Hoosier Republican,
Thinking back to my days playing college basketball, I always wanted to defy expectations. Even when facing our toughest competition, with our only hope being to keep the score close enough to win on a buzzer-beating shot, I wanted to win and to win big. The success of Indiana’s Republican Party is built on a similar approach.

**We don’t want to win; we want to run up the score and continually defy expectations.**

And through the tireless efforts of our volunteers, the constant generosity of our donors and the relentless pursuit of governing excellence by our elected officials, we’ve put in place a model of success that can – and should — be replicated by Republicans nationwide.

**We invest in the fundamentals of grassroots politics, we draw up policy game plans that notch wins for Hoosiers, and we always have an eye on making our team bigger, stronger, and better in the long run.**

From the time I became chairman, we immediately put an emphasis on data, including hiring two full-time staffers to procure and analyze data that could be utilized to connect with voters. Over the past two election cycles, that investment has yielded _over 8.5 million voter contacts, 1.5 million at doors, 4.5 million over the phone and 2.5 million by text message_.

To fuel Republican efforts up and down the ticket, State Party and Governor Holcomb’s campaign combined forces on fundraising. With the added strength of this first-of-its-kind joint-fundraising effort, **over $25 million was raised over the four-year cycle breaking records for both entities.** The real-world impact is seen when _the two entities were able to invest $400,000 in the Attorney General and Statehouse races over the last three weeks of the campaign._

After a strong showing for Indiana Republicans in 2016, many thought the party had reached its apex. But we doubled down and targeted more wins. And they came.**Knocking off an incumbent in the top targeted U.S. Senate race in 2018. Setting a new all-time high for mayors by winning 71 in 2019. And in 2020 we set a new high mark for votes for Governor Holcomb and we won the second most competitive U.S. House race in 2020.**

And we are not done. On November 4th, we started planning for more wins in 2022.

There is still room to grow. We have long been a leader in promoting women and have four female statewide elected officials and two members of Congress – but we need more. And our party has initiated [a first of its kind diversity program](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bee95d0615&e=1acd9bb3d6) to help establish better trust and connection between Black and Latino Hoosiers and Indiana’s Republican Party.

I’ve told my team on more than one occasion that winning the first championship is easy. But winning year after year requires four or five times the effort than the first. It means staying true to core beliefs and values. **It means fighting for economic opportunity for every American. It means showing compassion to all and including everyone in the conversation. It means going to places where we haven’t been welcomed before. It means thinking big and offering bold solutions to our nation’s challenges.**

That’s the Indiana model of politics and policy and why our campaign theme this year was One Indiana — For All. It’s a model that continues to defy expectations. I wish you all a happy New Year, with an even brighter 2021 to come.

Happy New Year,

Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party

clean_body: Thinking back to my days playing college basketball, I always wanted to defy expectations. | | | | | | | Hoosier Republican, Thinking back to my days playing college basketball, I always wanted to defy expectations. Even when facing our toughest competition, with our only hope being to keep the score close enough to win on a buzzer-beating shot, I wanted to win and to win big. The success of Indiana’s Republican Party is built on a similar approach. We don’t want to win; we want to run up the score and continually defy expectations. And through the tireless efforts of our volunteers, the constant generosity of our donors and the relentless pursuit of governing excellence by our elected officials, we’ve put in place a model of success that can – and should — be replicated by Republicans nationwide. We invest in the fundamentals of grassroots politics, we draw up policy game plans that notch wins for Hoosiers, and we always have an eye on making our team bigger, stronger, and better in the long run. From the time I became chairman, we immediately put an emphasis on data, including hiring two full-time staffers to procure and analyze data that could be utilized to connect with voters. Over the past two election cycles, that investment has yielded over 8.5 million voter contacts, 1.5 million at doors, 4.5 million over the phone and 2.5 million by text message. To fuel Republican efforts up and down the ticket, State Party and Governor Holcomb’s campaign combined forces on fundraising. With the added strength of this first-of-its-kind joint-fundraising effort, over $25 million was raised over the four-year cycle breaking records for both entities. The real-world impact is seen when the two entities were able to invest $400,000 in the Attorney General and Statehouse races over the last three weeks of the campaign. After a strong showing for Indiana Republicans in 2016, many thought the party had reached its apex. But we doubled down and targeted more wins. And they came.Knocking off an incumbent in the top targeted U.S. Senate race in 2018. Setting a new all-time high for mayors by winning 71 in 2019. And in 2020 we set a new high mark for votes for Governor Holcomb and we won the second most competitive U.S. House race in 2020. And we are not done. On November 4th, we started planning for more wins in 2022. There is still room to grow. We have long been a leader in promoting women and have four female statewide elected officials and two members of Congress – but we need more. And our party has initiated to help establish better trust and connection between Black and Latino Hoosiers and Indiana’s Republican Party. I’ve told my team on more than one occasion that winning the first championship is easy. But winning year after year requires four or five times the effort than the first. It means staying true to core beliefs and values. It means fighting for economic opportunity for every American. It means showing compassion to all and including everyone in the conversation. It means going to places where we haven’t been welcomed before. It means thinking big and offering bold solutions to our nation’s challenges. That’s the Indiana model of politics and policy and why our campaign theme this year was One Indiana — For All. It’s a model that continues to defy expectations. I wish you all a happy New Year, with an even brighter 2021 to come. Happy New Year, Kyle Hupfer Chairman, Indiana Republican Party | | | id:2020-04-28-19:45:12:543t | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved.

Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom. I am the conservative businessman and donor who is fighting the radical Left like our freedoms depend on it- because they do! Right now, I need you to join me in that fight

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=iTKLJbWF1rcqI4c&b=.e61OqEVm4a2fdxeyVnvzQ
!

I have one word to describe the two radical Democrats running for U.S. Senate in Georgia: Disgusting.

The Democrats are offering Georgia a slap in the face. They despise your traditional values. They loathe our all-American patriotism. Warnock even praised the vile Rev. Wright who "damned America"! Ossoff cannot say the name of our country without a contemptuous sneer. These two LOSERS are unworthy of Georgia, my friends.

They are funded from out-of-state limousine liberals like Soros and Bloomberg.

And now we see that Ossoff is taking Chinese Communist money:

The Perdue campaign connected the dots in a digital ad with news clips of critics, including Sen. Marsha Blackburn, Tennessee Republican, raising concerns about Mr. Ossoff’s company receiving payments from PCCW Media, which is owned in part by China Unicom, a state-run telecommunications provider.

The ad, “Jon Ossoff Has a China Problem,” ends with a photo of Mr. Swalwell posing with Christine Fang, the suspected Chinese operative who’s also known as Fang Fang.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=iTKLJbWF1rcqI4c&b=.e61OqEVm4a2fdxeyVnvzQ

But as bad as being a pawn for the Communist Chinese is, it's even worse, what Warnock has done:

The incident was first reported by the Atlanta Journal-Constitution as Warnock was gearing up to compete against GOP Sen. Kelly Loeffler in what has become a high-stakes runoff that will determine which party controls the U.S. Senate.

In the footage, an officer can be seen pulling up to Warnock’s house in Atlanta. Warnock tells the officer his estranged wife called the police on him and alleged that he had run over her foot with his car, which Warnock denied.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=iTKLJbWF1rcqI4c&b=.e61OqEVm4a2fdxeyVnvzQ

One, bought by the Chinese.

The other, a Marxist and a wife-beater.

These clowns are funded by the lowest of the low, people who hate our freedom and want to sell our country out.

They share the agenda of AOC:

-Unlimited amnesty for illegals

-Defunding the police.

-Making working people pay for the rich to take "gender studies" college classes!

-"Repenting for whiteness" (Warnock's words, not mine).

-AOC's Green New Deal.

IF THIS ISN'T WHAT YOU WANT, HELP US!

These traitors and scumbags need to be beaten. Let's beat them!.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=iTKLJbWF1rcqI4c&b=.e61OqEVm4a2fdxeyVnvzQ

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=iTKLJbWF1rcqI4c&b=.e61OqEVm4a2fdxeyVnvzQ

Drain the DC Swamp PAC is the anti-Lincoln Project. We don't surrender to Communists, we don't coddle them, we don't work with them- we defeat them, and we do it often!

We are America First patriots who are taking the fight to the Socialists and their anti-American allies. Help us make sure the Good Guys have control of the Senate!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=iTKLJbWF1rcqI4c&b=.e61OqEVm4a2fdxeyVnvzQ

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=iTKLJbWF1rcqI4c&b=.e61OqEVm4a2fdxeyVnvzQ

Time is running out. January's election is almost upon us! We are making a real difference here - but with your help!

We want pro-gun, pro-life, pro-Trump Senators to win, but we MUST win two of two races there. Will you help us?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=iTKLJbWF1rcqI4c&b=.e61OqEVm4a2fdxeyVnvzQ

Your contribution is so crucial. Your $25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000 or more will send an immediate message to the Left

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=iTKLJbWF1rcqI4c&b=.e61OqEVm4a2fdxeyVnvzQ
- Georgia is not Socialist, and we don't need the anti-American politicans either!

The President is fighting. Our two Republican Senators are fighting. They need us! Help us push forward and win in Georgia

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=iTKLJbWF1rcqI4c&b=.e61OqEVm4a2fdxeyVnvzQ
, for America!

Respectfully,

Image

secure.anedot.com/draintheswamp/st1

Christopher Ekstrom

Businessman

America First Donor

P.S. Socialists control the House of Representatives and God only knows what they will do. The ONLY firewall we have against all of that is the United States Senate - and that could change if we lose on January 5th in Georgia. Donate right now to help us save the Senate.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=iTKLJbWF1rcqI4c&b=.e61OqEVm4a2fdxeyVnvzQ

Image But as bad as being a pawn for the Communist Chinese is, it's even worse, what Warnock has done: The incident was first reported by the Atlanta Journal-Constitution as Warnock was gearing up to compete against GOP Sen. Kelly Loeffler in what has become a high-stakes runoff that will determine which party controls the U.S. Senate. In the footage, an officer can be seen pulling up to Warnock’s house in Atlanta. Warnock tells the officer his estranged wife called the police on him and alleged that he had run over her foot with his car, which Warnock denied. Image One, bought by the Chinese. The other, a Marxist and a wife-beater. These clowns are funded by the lowest of the low, people who hate our freedom and want to sell our country out. They share the agenda of AOC: -Unlimited amnesty for illegals -Defunding the police. -Making working people pay for the rich to take "gender studies" college classes! -"Repenting for whiteness" (Warnock's words, not mine). -AOC's Green New Deal. IF THIS ISN'T WHAT YOU WANT, HELP US! These traitors and scumbags need to be beaten. Let's beat them!. Image Drain the DC Swamp PAC is the anti-Lincoln Project. We don't surrender to Communists, we don't coddle them, we don't work with them- we defeat them, and we do it often! We are America First patriots who are taking the fight to the Socialists and their anti-American allies. Help us make sure the Good Guys have control of the Senate! Image Time is running out. January's election is almost upon us! We are making a real difference here - but with your help! We want pro-gun, pro-life, pro-Trump Senators to win, but we MUST win two of two races there. Will you help us? Your contribution is so crucial. Your $25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000 or more will send an immediate message to the Left - Georgia is not Socialist, and we don't need the anti-American politicans either! The President is fighting. Our two Republican Senators are fighting. They need us! Help us push forward and win in Georgia , for America! Respectfully, Image secure.anedot.com/draintheswamp/st1 Christopher Ekstrom Businessman America First Donor P.S. Socialists control the House of Representatives and God only knows what they will do. name: Team Evergreen
subject: Let's go get 'em
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Wanted to make sure you didn't miss this.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=5572%2E53494%2EOTccE0) Friend, 🎶 It's the final countdown! 🎶 We're about to close the books on our first calendar year as an official organization! In the seven months since we launched Evergreen, we've been hard at work, rolling out plans and policy memos and bringing our collective voice into the public conversation about climate. (You might've even seen Evergreen mentioned in Bloomberg, Axios, the _Washington Post_ , and the _Houston Chronicle_ just in recent weeks as our voice and presence grows in the movement.) And now, with just a couple days left, we wanted to make sure you had a chance to contribute (or contribute again!) to our end-of-year numbers. | **2020 SUPPORTER RECORD**
**Your Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**2020 Donor Status*:** No 2020 donation on record
**Suggested Action:** **[Donate before midnight to our end-of-year fundraising goal](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1432?t=3&akid=5572%2E53494%2EOTccE0)**
---
**[We've set an ambitious goal of raising $15,000 from grassroots supporters before midnight Thursday—can you help us reach it, friend?](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1432?t=4&akid=5572%2E53494%2EOTccE0)**
[YES, I CAN! ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1432?t=5&akid=5572%2E53494%2EOTccE0)
---
Together, we've laid solid groundwork for the policy debates ahead. With Trump on the way out, 2021 is the year we can make a clean energy future our present.
We look forward to doing that work alongside you and everyone else who's committed to this movement.
**[With less than 48 hours to go, we're just $2,987 short of our $15,000 end-of-year goal. So we're humbly asking: Can you rush a donation tonight to fuel us up for 2021?](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1432?t=6&akid=5572%2E53494%2EOTccE0)**
Thanks for everything you've contributed to the climate movement this year, whether it was your time, your talents, or a few bucks. It all adds up.
See you in 2021. As Gov. Inslee always said on the campaign trail, "Let's go get 'em."
Team Evergreen
[DONATE ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1432?t=7&akid=5572%2E53494%2EOTccE0)
---
_*If your donation isn't reflected, it may still be processing or in a different system. Thanks for your support!_
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=5572%2E53494%2EOTccE0). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

name: Roger Misso
subject: Help us win Georgia, one Veteran at a time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

_**641,267.**_

It's the number that nobody is talking about - the total veterans' population in the state of Georgia. And it could be the key to winning two special elections for the U.S. Senate on January 5th.

We launched the [Veterans Win Georgia Fund](https://act.myngp.com/el/5fFfAS9urDPoqBJhdHhB1YezttpZpUdAR2tb6DxE0UI=/KWVSVtTrcyYc7PhLqUgUbU52tNuG3qzdxAQEV2dHffg=) to reach these voters specifically and make sure they cast their ballots for Rev. Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff. Our fund supports the relational canvassing efforts already underway to encourage all Georgia veterans to return their ballots and, additionally, to leverage close contacts to persuade these veteran-voters to help us save the Senate.

But we can't do it without you! [_**From now until Election Day, we are matching every contribution you make 100% up to $5,000! Every last dollar will be used to bring every last vote home to Georgia. Will you chip in right now to help us win the day for Raphael and Jon?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/5fFfAS9urDPoqBJhdHhB1YezttpZpUdAR2tb6DxE0UI=/KWVSVtTrcyYc7PhLqUgUbU52tNuG3qzdxAQEV2dHffg=)

Just 88,000 votes separated Jon Ossoff from his corrupt Republican opponent in November. By mobilizing a veterans population of more than 600,000, we have the power to close that gap and win - twice - in Georgia. Together, we will get the job done!

In solidarity,
Roger

_Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/5fFfAS9urDPoqBJhdHhB1YezttpZpUdAR2tb6DxE0UI=/ALxT9hxd5WYMRscKf9CHDdI_769mmW2gp7uzMq48MGY=)_
[_@RogerMissoCNY_](https://act.myngp.com/el/5fFfAS9urDPoqBJhdHhB1YezttpZpUdAR2tb6DxE0UI=/F1DK2FdkZCYnJGJp6xIVhNzFWfQaRY9MF9TTyHPQxn0=)

Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
